Module org.flossware.commons
Package org.flossware.commons

Class AbstractBase

java.lang.Object
org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractStringifiable
public abstract class AbstractBase extends Object
An abstract base class that can be used to conveniently extends to get common functionality (for example a logger).
Since:
1.0
Author:
Scot P. Floess

  • Method Details

    • getLogger

      protected Logger getLogger()
      Return the logger.
      Returns:
      the logger.

    • log

      protected void log(Level level, Throwable throwable, String str, Object... objs)
      Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
      Parameters:
      level - the level of the log.
      throwable - the throwable to log with str.
      str - the format string.
      objs - a format arguments that are converted to an object array for logging.

    • log

      protected void log(Level level, Throwable throwable, String str)
      Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
      Parameters:
      level - the level of the log.
      throwable - the throwable to log with str.
      str - the format string.

    • log

      protected void log(Level level, String str, Object... objs)
      Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
      Parameters:
      level - the level of the log.
      str - the format string.
      objs - a format arguments that are converted to an object array for logging.

    • logAndReturn

      protected <V> V logAndReturn(Level level, String str, V retVal)
      Log and return the value.
      Type Parameters:
      V - the type of data to return.
      Parameters:
      level - the level to log at.
      str - the log string.
      retVal - the value to return.
      Returns:
      the object logged.

    • logAndReturnByIndex

      protected <V> V logAndReturnByIndex(Level level, String str, int index, Object... objs)
      Log and return the value that are found at index in the format arguments objs. The "i" in LogFi stands for integer position. Without a unique name on this method, there is conflict in calling the logAndReturn() counterpart.
      Type Parameters:
      V - the type to return.
      Parameters:
      level - the level of the log.
      str - the format string.
      index - the index into objs that is the return value.
      objs - a format arguments that are converted to an object array for logging.
      Returns:
      the value found at index index in the format arguments objs.

    • logAndReturn

      protected <V> V logAndReturn(Level level, String str, Object... objs)
      Log and return the value at found as the 0th index in the format arguments objs.
      Type Parameters:
      V - the type to return.
      Parameters:
      level - the level of the log.
      str - the format string.
      objs - a format arguments that are converted to an object array for logging.
      Returns:
      the value found at 0th index in the format arguments objs.

      Convenience method to log at INFO level.

      objs - a format arguments converted to an object array for logging
